rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF EUGENE ARMISTEAD CARTER
rulings.Calendar Matter: Respondents Victoria Beuerle And Michael Paul Carters Notice Of Demurrer And Demurrer To Petitioner Eddie Caboaras Amended Petition To Set Aside The Order For Final Distribution; For Return Of Property; Conversion; Breach Of Fiduciary Duty; Constructive Fraud; Intentional Interference With Expected Inheritence; Double Damages; And Attorney Fees
rulings.Rulings: Hearing on motion continued to Wednesday, May 29, 2025, at 2:00 p.m., per court.

This tentative ruling is issued by Judge Stephen M. Murphy. Before the court is Petitioner Kerrie A. Schwartz's Motion to Consolidate Cases. The motion is unopposed. Motion to Consolidate Cases, specifically Estate of Elliot Saxe PES-25-308310 and Estate of Elliot Saxe PES-21-304812, is GRANTED. Estate of Elliot Saxe PES-21-304812 will be designated the lead case, and all further filings in either case number will be filed in Estate of Elliot Saxe PES-21-304812. The court will issue an order consolidating cases. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise other parties and the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) no later than 4:00 p.m. on the day before the hearing. To appear by Zoom, go to zoom.us and click "Join Meeting." Enter Meeting ID number 1602254765 and passcode 514879. To appear telephonically through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and follow the prompts. Enter Meeting ID number 1602254765# and passcode 514879#. Parties appearing via Zoom should use their full names in the "Your Name" section. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling CourtCall at 1-888-882-6878 and obtaining an appearance access code for the hearing's scheduled date and time in Department 204.
